species.citation: (Lour.) Kuntze , Revis. Gen. Pl. 2 (1891) 703 ; Elmer, LPB 5 (1913) 1645; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 213; Geerinck, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 11 (1993) 367; ≡ Molineria capitulata (Lour.) Herb. , Amaryllidaceae (1837) 84 ; Backer & Bakh.f., Fl. Jav. 3 (1968) 209; ≡ Leucojum capitulatum Lour. , Fl. Cochinch. (1790) 199. = Molineria recurvata (Dryand. ex W.T.Aiton) Herb. , Amaryllidaceae (1837) 84; ≡ Curculigo recurvata Dryand. ex W.T.Aiton , Hort. Kew., 2nd Ed. 2 (1811) 253 ; Naves, Novis. App. (1880) 253; Elmer, LPB 5 (1913) 1645. = Curculigo glabra Merr. , PJS 2c (1907) 267 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 213; Type: Merrill 5750, Mindoro.
species.distribution: Australia, Bangladesh, India, Java, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Nepal, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Singapore, Solomon Isls, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand. ALABAT, BATANES, BILIRAN, JOLO (photos), LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Apayao (photos), Aurora (photos), Benguet, Camarines Sur, Ifugao, Laguna, Mountain Province, Pampanga, Quezon, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, PANAY, POLILLO, SAMAR, SIARGAO.
species.notes: Forests and thickets, chiefly at low and medium elevation. 0-2000m.

species.citation: Lauterb. , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 50 (1913) 304 ; Geerinck, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 11 (1993) 367; Type: from New Guinea.

Dryand. ex W.T.Aiton , Hort. Kew., 2nd Ed. 2 (1811) 253 ; Geerinck, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 11 (1993) 369; ≡ Molineria latifolia (Dryand. ex W.T.Aiton) Herb. ex Kurz , Natuurk. Tijdschr. Ned.-Indië 27 (1864) 232 ; Backer & Bakh.f., Fl. Jav. 3 (1968) 209. = Curculigo agusanensis Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1645 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 213; Type: Elmer 13584, Mindanao: Agusan del Norte, Mt Urdaneta. = Curculigo weberi Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1646 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 214; Type: Elmer 14304, Mindanao: Agusan del Norte, Mt Urdaneta. = Curculigo brevipedunculata Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1647 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 213; Type: Elmer 13164, Palawan, Mt Pulgar (Thumb Peak). var. latifolia. Distribution: Borneo, India, Java, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand. BALABAC, LUZON: Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Lanao del Sur, Zamboanga, PALAWAN, PANAY, SAMAR. Notes: Lowland and medium elevation forests. Native.
species.distribution: BALABAC, LUZON: Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Lanao del Sur, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Norte (photos), MINDORO, NEGROS (photos), PALAWAN, PANAY, SAMAR.

species.citation: Gaertn. , Fruct. Sem. Pl. 1 (1788) 63 ; Elmer, LPB 5 (1913) 1645; Merr., Sp. Blancoanae (1918) 100; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 213; Geerinck, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 11 (1993) 370. = Gethyllis acaulis Blanco , Fl. Filip., 1st Ed. (1837) 260 ; Fl. Filip. ed. 2 (1845) 181; Fl. Filip. ed. 3, 1 (1877) 324.
species.distribution: Borneo, Cambodia, India, Java, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. BALABAC, BILIRAN, BUSUANGA (photos), GUIMARAS (photos), LUZON: Abra (photos), Benguet, Mountain Province, Pangasinan, Rizal, Sorsogon, Zambales (photos), MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao del Norte, Davao del Sur, MINDORO, PALAWAN, PANAY, SAMAR, SEMIRARA.
species.notes: Low to medium elevation grasslands, particularly kogonales type.

species.citation: Lour. , Fl. Cochinch. (1790) 200 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 214; Geerinck, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 11 (1993) 370; Type: from Vietnam.
species.distribution: Cambodia, China, India, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON: Benguet, Mountain Province, Nueva Ecija, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Lanao, MINDORO (photos), PALAWAN (photos).
species.notes: Grassland and other sunny places, medium and higher elevation. (?-)870-2300m.
